techniques.name: Fingerprint Authentication
techniques.description: Authentication using unique fingerprint patterns and ridge characteristics.
techniques.requirements: Fingerprint scanner or high-resolution camera, functioning fingerprints
sources: @book{maltoni2009handbook,  title={Handbook of fingerprint recognition},  author={Maltoni, Davide and Maio, Dario and Jain, Anil K and Prabhakar, Salil},  year={2009},  publisher={Springer}, doi = {10.1007/978-1-84882-254-2}}
